name: MusicLyrics
description: A powerful Telegram music streaming bot for voice chats with group management, games, and security features.

API_ID.description: Telegram API ID — get from https://my.telegram.org/apps

LICENSE_KEY.description: ⚠️ REQUIRED — License key to run MusicLyrics. Get your key from @R4J_81 on Telegram. Send your BOT_TOKEN to receive a unique key. Format: ML-XXXXXXXX-XXXXXXXX

API_HASH.description: Telegram API Hash — get from https://my.telegram.org/apps

BOT_TOKEN.description: Bot Token — get from @BotFather on Telegram

STRING_SESSION.description: Pyrogram v2 string session for userbot (needed for voice chat streaming). Generate with: python3 -c "from pyrogram import Client; Client(':memory:', api_id=API_ID, api_hash='HASH').run(Client.export_session_string)"

MONGO_URL.description: MongoDB connection URI — get free cluster from https://mongodb.com/atlas

OWNER_ID.description: Your Telegram user ID (numeric). Find via @userinfobot on Telegram

SUDO_USERS.description: Space-separated Telegram user IDs with sudo/admin privileges (e.g. '123456 789012')

LOG_GROUP_ID.description: Telegram group/channel ID for bot event logs (e.g. -1001234567890). Set 0 to disable.

BOT_USERNAME.description: Your bot's Telegram username (without @). Used for invite links.

SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID.description: Spotify App Client ID (optional — for Spotify track support). Get from https://developer.spotify.com/dashboard

COOKIES_TXT.description: YouTube cookies in Netscape format (paste full content of cookies.txt exported from browser). Prevents 'Sign in to confirm you're not a bot' errors on cloud servers.

YT_PO_TOKEN.description: YouTube PO (Proof of Origin) token for additional bot-detection bypass. Format: web+VISITOR_DATA:PO_TOKEN (optional, advanced).

YT_VISITOR_DATA.description: YouTube visitor data string (used with PO token). Optional, advanced.

AI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key for AI chat features (optional). Get from https://aistudio.google.com/apikey

COBALT_API_KEY.description: Cobalt API key for cloud-friendly YouTube stream extraction (optional). Get from https://cobalt.tools/

YOUTUBE_PROXY.description: Single YouTube proxy URL. Format: http://user:pass@host:port — REQUIRED for cloud platforms (Heroku/Railway/Render) where YouTube blocks server IPs.

YOUTUBE_PROXY_LIST.description: Multiple proxies for rotation (comma-separated). Supports Webshare format (ip:port:user:pass) and standard format (http://user:pass@host:port). RECOMMENDED over single proxy to avoid rate limits.
